issue_title: [Feature] Add debug log when calling to waitForResponse/waitForRequest
issue_body: When calling to `waitForResponse`/`waitForRequest` I don't see any debug logs, it can be very useful to have some debug log with the URL or the predicate in order to debug issues
pr_title: feat(logs): add wrapApiCall for logging to many api methods
pr_body:
Some methods (quite a few!) were missing the wrapper that produces the log.

Fixes #5087.
